raw_prompt: The Boss asks: Compute the storage size for this OLAP cube. We have 1 million rows, each row 100 bytes.
raw_response:
METHOD: OLAP Cube Storage Size
INPUTS:
  Rows=1,000,000 [VERIFIED]
  Row size=100 bytes [VERIFIED]
  Dim overhead~50% (star-schema) [INFERRED]
FORMULA: Storage=Rows x Row Size x (1+dim_overhead)
SUBSTITUTION: 1,000,000 x 100 x 1.50=150,000,000 bytes
RESULT: 150 MB
SENSITIVITY: +/-20% on overhead->120-180 MB
evidence_quotes: Computation block with full substitution shown
No DATA UNAVAILABLE for supplied data
